spec.name: Force Sense Beam
spec.summary: Detects force kinetic flux as a directed line at self reach, targeting the caster with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions.
spec.effect_description: Detects force kinetic flux as a directed line at self reach, targeting the caster with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions. A square sense/affect recipe that channels force discipline into kinetic output. It applies a beam pattern against self across self reach with immediate persistence.
